title: Provider Failover Handling
activity_flow: START: Caller invokes PendingResponse resolve (e.g., generate(), embed(), rerank(), etc.)
Build ordered providers list from config (primary + fallback chain)
Resolve Provider instance via Ai::fakeableEmbeddingProvider() or Ai::textProviderFor()
Determine effective model (explicit or provider default)
Gateway wraps HTTP call in withErrorHandling(providerName, Closure)
TRY: Execute HTTP API call to provider
ELSE IF status in overloadedStatusCodes() [default: 503] → throw ProviderOverloadedException::forProvider(name) [implements FailoverableException]
ELSE IF error message matches insufficientCreditPatterns() → throw InsufficientCreditsException::forProvider(name) [implements FailoverableException]
event(new ProviderFailedOver($provider, $model, $e)) — dispatched to Laravel event system
YES → continue (next iteration of foreach loop)
key_decisions: Other HTTP error → re-throw as RequestException (NOT failoverable, no retry)
FailoverableException caught AND more providers remain → continue loop
FailoverableException caught AND no providers left → throw last exception

methods: withErrorHandling(string $providerName, Closure $callback): mixed — wraps HTTP call, maps status codes to typed exceptions
overloadedStatusCodes(): array — returns [503] by default, overridable per gateway
insufficientCreditPatterns(): array — returns [] by default, overridable per gateway

failover_loop_pattern: Identical pattern in all PendingResponse classes: foreach providers → try provider call → catch FailoverableException → event(ProviderFailedOver) → continue → after loop throw $lastException
key_relationships: RateLimitedException, ProviderOverloadedException, InsufficientCreditsException all implement FailoverableException
PendingResponse emits ProviderFailedOver event on failoverable error
ProviderFailedOver carries Provider, model string, and FailoverableException
important_notes: Non-failoverable RequestExceptions (e.g. 400, 401, 404) are re-thrown immediately by withErrorHandling and bypass the failover loop. The provider iteration order determines fallback priority. AgentFailedOver (src/Events/AgentFailedOver.php) is the equivalent event used in Promptable.php for agent-based flows.
